title: PSEB 10th Result 2026 (OUT) Live: Harleen Sharma tops Punjab Board Class 10 results, 94.52% students pass
description: PSEB 10th Result 2026 Live: PSEB 10th results has been declared on May 11, 2026. The direct link to check the Class 10 results is available on pseb.ac.in. Follow the blog for latest updates.
